chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-258 of 2023 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on MA No.542/2024 (151 CPC) 12-09-2025 Mr. Waheed Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General -------- Counsel does not press this CMA No.542/2024 under instruction, which is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
